common_themes: SQL and database internals (indexing, isolation levels, concurrency control)
System design questions (marketplace catalog, TikTok-like app, banking systems, parking systems)
HackerRank online assessments as first screen
Typically 2-4 technical rounds followed by behavioral/culture fit
Problem solving with data structures (stack, queue, linked list, trees, DP, sliding window)
frequently_asked_questions: Find the index of an element in a sorted rotated array
Number of subarrays having product less than or equal to K
Calculate Min at any point of time in stack
Find common elements in sorted arrays
Tree question - variant of level order traversal
Design a system for saving and current account bank
Design a TikTok-like video platform with product sidebar
Explain database indexing and isolation levels
What do you know about SQL injection? How to defend?

positive: Interviewer was helpful and gave hints when stuck
Focus on medium LeetCode, hard is rare
Be ready to discuss your GitHub repos
Database internals questions are common for backend
warnings: No feedback on rejection in some cases
Follow up politely if you don't hear back in a week

note: Full interview details available in original glassdoor scrape files
